# 📋 GitHub Actions - Badges & Status

Adicione estes badges ao seu README para mostrar status:

## 📊 Badges

```markdown
[![Quality Check](https://github.com/SrLuther/ARKLAND/actions/workflows/quality-check.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/SrLuther/ARKLAND/actions/workflows/quality-check.yml)
[![Frontend Tests](https://github.com/SrLuther/ARKLAND/actions/workflows/frontend.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/SrLuther/ARKLAND/actions/workflows/frontend.yml)
[![Security Check](https://github.com/SrLuther/ARKLAND/actions/workflows/security.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/SrLuther/ARKLAND/actions/workflows/security.yml)
[![Documentation](https://github.com/SrLuther/ARKLAND/actions/workflows/docs.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/SrLuther/ARKLAND/actions/workflows/docs.yml)
```
